## Leveraging industrial grade superconducting quantum computers, educational grade NMR quantum computers, quantum computing cloud platform and software, we empower scientific research and education, drug R&D, fintech, AI, and many other cutting-edge fields.
Superconducting Quantum Products & Services
NMR Quantum Products & Services
Quantum Computing Cloud Platform & Software
#  Superconducting Quantum Products & Services 
SPINQ SQC
#### Superconducting Quantum Computer
It leverages circuits with Josephson junctions, where qubits are formed by macroscopic quantum effects. This method offers scalable qubit numbers, high gate fidelity, and controllable multi-qubit coupling, making it the most rapidly advancing and industrialized quantum computing technology.
[Learn More](https://www.spinquanta.com/products-services/superconducting-quantum-computer) [Ask to Buy](https://www.spinquanta.com/contact-us)
![SPINQ SQC](https://www.spinquanta.com/products/superconducting-quantum-products)
SPINQ QPU C Series
#### Superconducting QPU
Designed and fabricated by SpinQ, the QPU C Series superconducting quantum chips are engineered for high-coherence and high-stability quantum computing applications. Operating at ultra-low temperatures of around 20 mK, each chip features a high Qi factor, extended coherence times, and excellent circuit uniformity. As the core foundation of SpinQ’s self-developed superconducting quantum computing architecture, the QPU C Series provides the critical hardware basis for building scalable, high-performance quantum processors.
[Learn More](https://www.spinquanta.com/products-services/quantum-chip) [Ask to Buy](https://www.spinquanta.com/contact-us)
C103
C25
C10
SPINQ QCM System
#### Quantum Control & Measurement System
SPINQ QCM System is designed for high compatibility with superconducting QPUs and features a modular architecture with high-precision RF control electronics. It is versatile, supporting various quantum computing platforms and capable of managing the measurement and control of hundreds of qubits. Utilizing FPGA for hardware-level acceleration, the system offers high vertical resolution and includes extensive tutorial codes for qubit characterization and calibration. This ensures users can achieve faster, more accurate, and more efficient qubit measurement and control.
[Learn More](https://www.spinquanta.com/products-services/quantum-control-and-measurement-system) [Ask to Buy](https://www.spinquanta.com/contact-us)
![SPINQ QCM System](https://www.spinquanta.com/products/superconducting-quantum-products)
QPU Foundry & Characterization Services
As quantum computing advances toward practical utility, the quantum chip stands as the convergence of physical limits and engineering precision. Leveraging our proprietary high-standard micro-nano fabrication center and deep expertise in superconducting device physics, SpinQ provides global partners with end-to-end superconducting quantum chip foundry services—from design to packaging—serving as the solid foundation for your quantum exploration.
[Learn More](https://www.spinquanta.com/products-services/qpu-foundry-service) [Contact Us](https://www.spinquanta.com/contact-us)
![QPU Foundry & Characterization Services](https://www.spinquanta.com/products/superconducting-quantum-products)
Cryogenic Environment Deployment
A stable cryogenic environment is the prerequisite for high-fidelity qubit. Leveraging extensive experience in cryogenic engineering and system integration, SpinQ provides full-stack deployment solutions—from design and equipment selection to integration and maintenance. Our services cover dilution refrigerators, cryogenic RF components, and laboratory retrofitting, delivering a high-performance, scalable, and stable experimental environment through unified delivery and continuous support.
[Learn More](https://www.spinquanta.com/products-services/quantum-computer-cryogenic-deployment) [Contact Us](https://www.spinquanta.com/contact-us)
![Cryogenic Environment Deployment](https://www.spinquanta.com/products/superconducting-quantum-products)
